introSection: Thunderation is a steel hybrid terrain roller coaster located at Silver Dollar City in Branson, Missouri, USA. Opened on April 10, 1993, it was the park's second roller coaster, after Fire In The Hole in 1972. It was built by Intermountain Rides in conjunction with Arrow Dynamics. The ride's supports were designed by Ride Centerline.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
In 1992, Silver Dollar City announced that Thunderation would be coming to the park. The ride opened on April 10, 1993.

The third and fifth car on each train were operated in reverse by 1999. This offering was discontinued in 2011.

On February 16, 2026, it was announced that Thunderation would be closed permanently on January 2, 2027.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Unlike most roller coasters, the lift hill is located near the end of the track layout.

fullText:
Thunderation is a steel hybrid terrain roller coaster located at Silver Dollar City in Branson, Missouri, USA. Opened on April 10, 1993, it was the park's second roller coaster, after Fire In The Hole in 1972. It was built by Intermountain Rides in conjunction with Arrow Dynamics. The ride's supports were designed by Ride Centerline.

In 1992, Silver Dollar City announced that Thunderation would be coming to the park. The ride opened on April 10, 1993.

The third and fifth car on each train were operated in reverse by 1999. This offering was discontinued in 2011.

On February 16, 2026, it was announced that Thunderation would be closed permanently on January 2, 2027.

Unlike most roller coasters, the lift hill is located near the end of the track layout.
